description_long: This object is a long, straight-bladed sword with a metallic sheen, likely made of steel. The blade is slender and tapers to a sharp point, suitable for thrusting or slashing. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped in a dark material for grip, and capped with a rounded pommel. A circular, gold-colored guard separates the blade from the handle, providing protection for the user's hand. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible decorative elements. The sword's proportions suggest it is lightweight and balanced for one-handed use.
description: A straight, slender sword with a metallic blade, dark-wrapped handle, and gold-colored circular guard. The design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the straight blade, dark handle, and gold guard.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed tip of the blade and the circular shape of the guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the blade and handle details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the blade's width and the rounded pommel at the end of the handle.
